summary: Initiative engine is fully implemented with 7 trigger types, rate limiting, and style learning. Proactive surfacing is via push notifications (initiatives), not inline chat DTU injection.

initiative_engine.style_learning: Exponential moving average (α=0.2) on length, formality, emoji, vocabulary

dtu_surfacing_in_chat.description: DTUs are surfaced in response to user messages via semantic search. The initiative engine sends separate push-style messages, not inline chat suggestions.

cross_lens_awareness.description: Lens parameter is received by chat backend and tracked in session. chat-lens-recommender.ts suggests lens transitions but doesn't change chat response behavior.

gaps.description: Chat DTU surfacing is purely reactive — the system only retrieves DTUs triggered by user messages. There is no path where the initiative engine injects proactive suggestions into active chat turns.
gaps.suggested_fix: Wire initiative engine to check for pending, high-relevance initiatives at chat turn start; if found, prepend a brief substrate note to the response.

gaps.description: Lens context does not reshape DTU selection or system prompt. A user in the 'studio' lens and a user in the 'code' lens get the same DTU scoring against the same working set.
gaps.suggested_fix: Add LENS_DOMAIN_AFFINITY map and apply a 1.3x boost to DTU scores for DTUs matching the current lens's domain keywords. Fixed in Phase 3.
